# Play Store Assets

## Generated files
- App bundle: `release-builds/DairyFlow-release.aab`
- Test APK: `release-builds/DairyFlow-release.apk`
- Play Store icon: `android/app/src/main/playstore/play-store-icon-512.png`
- Feature graphic: `android/app/src/main/playstore/feature-graphic-1024x500.png`
- Phone screenshots: `android/app/src/main/playstore/screenshots`
- Privacy policy page: `public/privacy-policy.html`
- Store copy: `android/app/src/main/playstore/PLAY_STORE_LISTING.md`
- Hosting guide: `android/app/src/main/playstore/PRIVACY_POLICY_HOSTING.md`
- Submission steps: `android/app/src/main/playstore/PLAY_STORE_SUBMISSION_STEPS.md`

## Still needed before submission
- Replace placeholder support email, website, phone, and address in `public/privacy-policy.html`
- Host `public/privacy-policy.html` on your website and paste the live URL into Play Console
- Capture 2 to 8 real app screenshots from the dashboard, customers, billing, deliveries, workers, and reports screens
- Add app category, contact details, and content rating details in Play Console

## Suggested screenshot set
- Dashboard overview
- Customer management
- Billing and payments
- Delivery tracking
- Worker attendance and salaries
- Reports and profit tracking
